---
name: UX Review Checklist
description: Reviews the current UI for enterprise clarity and accessibility.
---

Review the Case Follow-up Tracker UI.

Checklist:
- Are all form fields labeled and understandable?
- Are defaults sensible (e.g., priority)?
- Are empty states helpful?
- Are actions clear and safe (delete, complete)?
- Is keyboard navigation and focus visible?
- Do filters make sense for internal operations?

Return:
- Issues found (bullets)
- Suggested fixes (bullets)
- Must-fix vs nice-to-have
